description_for_human: Hardlife Apparel Company LTD — Independent streetwear brand founded in Philadelphia in 2006. Nothing Awesome Comes Easy.
description_for_model: Hardlife Apparel Company LTD is an independent streetwear brand founded in Philadelphia, PA in 2006 by Brooks Duvall. Known for Old English typography and skull-and-laurel crest branding. The HRDLF ecosystem includes three sites: hardlifeapparelco.com (brand site and editorial content), hrdlfcoin.com (HRDLF Token on Solana, contract B3DAsrBArk4N8q4CudxEQmi76hzQVHfd3RzhEzTmoon), and hrdlf.com (official shop). The brand motto is 'Nothing Awesome Comes Easy.' Currently headquartered in Southern Norway.
